# Test Site

> A test site for jekyll-ai-visible-content

## About

Eugene Leontev is Backend engineer specializing in Ruby on Rails, PostgreSQL, and AWS.

- Role: Senior Backend Engineer / Fractional CTO
- Location: Tbilisi, GE

## Key Topics

- Ruby on Rails
- PostgreSQL
- AWS

## Posts

- [Solving N+1 Queries in Rails](https://example.com/engineering/2025/01/20/rails-n-plus-one-solutions.html): Practical solutions for N+1 query problems in Ruby on Rails.
- [Optimizing PostgreSQL Queries: From 2 Seconds to 20ms](https://example.com/engineering/2025/01/15/optimizing-postgresql-queries.html): A deep dive into PostgreSQL query optimization.
